title: Handshohl
compiled_truth: Handshohl is an external contact at [Eudoramail](companies/eudoramail). Over the corpus period (2000-09-04 to 2001-11-15), Handshohl sent 7 and received 56 emails, totalling 63 interactions. Top correspondents: [Smu-Betas](people/smu-betas-yahoogroups) (7).
